basic_details.job_title: IIPS Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Chief Research Officer, Senior Project Officer and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Chief Research Officer, Senior Project Officer (Establishment & Procurement), Junior Research Officer (Report Writing)
basic_details.short_information: The International Institute for Population Sciences (IIPS) Walk-in Interview Notification 2026 has been released on the official website iipsindia.ac.in. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced through the IIPS Walk-in Recruitment 2026. Candidates up to 65 years of age who hold PhD in Demography/Mathematics/Statistics/Bio-Statistics, M.Tech/Masters in Computer Applications, Post Graduate Degree/Diploma, or M.Phil in Demography/Mathematics/Statistics/Social Sciences/Public Health/Bio-Statistics/Survey Research and Data Analytics are eligible to apply for these posts. The walk-in interview is

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 65 years for all posts. Institute reserves the right to relax qualification and experience in deserving cases.

qualification.details: Chief Research Officer: Essential: PhD in Demography/Mathematics/Statistics/Bio-Statistics with 10 years experience or M.Tech/Masters in Computer applications with 10 years experience in Large Scale Survey. Good working knowledge of CsPro. Desirable: STATA, SPSS, SAS, CsPro, Python. Senior Project Officer (Establishment & Procurement): Essential: (i) Post graduate Degree/Diploma in any discipline (ii) Retired from Central Government level 12 and above (iii) 10 years senior management experience (iv) Age not more than 65 years. Desirable: Knowledge of GoI Rules, proficient communication. Junior Research Officer (Report Writing): M.Phil in Demography/Mathematics/Statistics/Social Sciences/Public Health/Bio-Statistics and Demography/Survey Research and Data Analytics.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs.1,26,000/- (Remuneration will be fixed as per experience)
salary_details.details: Rs.1,26,000/- (Remuneration will be fixed as per experience) for all posts.
